HGSS.625.0000:
DRAGONAIR’s cute, but I don’t have
it. Do you have DRAGONAIR㊛?\f
Want to trade it for my DODRIO? [0200,0000]
HGSS.625.0001:
Wow! Thank you!
I always wanted DRAGONAIR!
HGSS.625.0002:
That’s not DRAGONAIR㊛.
Please trade with me if you get one.
HGSS.625.0003:
You don’t want to trade?
Oh, darn...
HGSS.625.0004:
How is that DODRIO I traded you doing?\f
Your DRAGONAIR’s so cute!
HGSS.625.0006:
It has worked stupendously hard,
hasn’t it?\f
As its reward, please give it
the Effort Ribbon.\f
HGSS.625.0009:
It needs to work a little harder.\f
If it does, I’ll give your Pokémon
something nice.
HGSS.625.0010:
It’s working a little harder, I see.\f
But it will need some more effort!
HGSS.625.0011:
It’s working hard, I see.\f
But it will need just a little
more effort!
HGSS.625.0012:
It’s working quite hard, I see.\f
But it will need a tiny bit
more effort!
HGSS.625.0013:
It’s working so hard, I see.\f
It’s almost there.
Just the smallest bit of effort, and\r
it’ll be there!
HGSS.625.0014:
Oh! That Effort Ribbon looks
good on your [0100,0000,0000]!
